messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create an HR consulting employee wellness plan deck targeting internal teams. Save it as 'Employee_Wellness_Plan.pptx', write all content in English, and use 4:3 Standard landscape slide sizes. The style should be soft pastel pink and lavender with playful icons. You must not use external APIs or web scraping; rely exclusively on hardcoded mock data within your code. When creating charts, you are mandated to use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of ChartType. Additionally, always defensively check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing its .text attribute.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PINK_LIGHT = "#FFB6C1"
LAVENDER = "#E6E6FA"
DEEP_PURPLE = "#4A0E4E"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
CORAL = "#FF8FAB"
SOFT_PINK_BG = "#FFF5F7"
ACCENT_LAVENDER = "#D8BFD8"

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_SECONDARY = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY if bold else FONT_SECONDARY
    if color:
        if isinstance(color, RGBColor):
            run.font.color.rgb = color
        else:
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    if bg_color:
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    else:
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p0 = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run0 = p0.add_run()
    run0.text = title
    run0.font.size = Pt(14)
    run0.font.bold = True
    run0.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DEEP_PURPLE)
    run0.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    if body:
        p1 = tf.add_paragraph()
        run1 = p1.add_run()
        run1.text = body
        run1.font.size = Pt(11)
        run1.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DEEP_PURPLE)
        run1.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left, top):
    label_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, Inches(3), Inches(0.4))
    label_shape.fill.solid()
    label_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CORAL)
    label_shape.line.fill.background()
    tf = label_shape.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(12)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    footer_text = f"Slide {page_num} of {total_pages}"
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(8.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = footer_text
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DEEP_PURPLE)
    run.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY


def add_decorative_circle(slide, cx, cy, radius, color_hex):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, cx - radius, cy - radius, radius * 2, radius * 2)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LAVENDER)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CORAL)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        tf = placeholder.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "[Image Placeholder]"
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DEEP_PURPLE)


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, SOFT_PINK_BG)

    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), PINK_LIGHT)
    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(9.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(1.5), LAVENDER)
    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(7.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(0.8), CORAL)
    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(0.2), Inches(5.5), Inches(0.6), ACCENT_LAVENDER)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Employee Wellness Plan"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.size = Pt(44)
            run.font.bold = True
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DEEP_PURPLE)
            run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(7), Inches(0.6),
                 "A Comprehensive Wellness Initiative for Our Teams", 24, False, DEEP_PURPLE, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_section_label(slide, "HR Consulting Division", Inches(3.5), Inches(4.0))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.8),
                 "Prepared for Internal Teams | Confidential", 14, False, hex_to_rgb(CORAL), PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 1, 6)


def slide_02_pillars(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Wellness Pillars"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
            run.font.bold = True
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DEEP_PURPLE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.5),
                 "Our holistic approach covers four key dimensions of employee well-being", 16, False, DEEP_PURPLE)

    pillars = [
        ("Physical Wellness", "Gym memberships, ergonomic workstations,\nhealth screenings & fitness challenges"),
        ("Mental Health", "Counseling services, stress management\nworkshops & mindfulness programs"),
        ("Social Connection", "Team-building events, peer support groups\n& community engagement activities"),
        ("Financial Wellness", "Retirement planning, financial coaching\n& employee assistance programs")
    ]

    positions = [
        (Inches(0.5), Inches(2.3)),
        (Inches(5.5), Inches(2.3)),
        (Inches(0.5), Inches(4.8)),
        (Inches(5.5), Inches(4.8))
    ]

    card_colors = [PINK_LIGHT, LAVENDER, ACCENT_LAVENDER, CORAL]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(pillars):
        add_card(slide, positions[i][0], positions[i][1], Inches(4.5), Inches(2.2), title, body, card_colors[i], DEEP_PURPLE)

    add_footer(slide, 2, 6)


def slide_03_timeline(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Implementation Timeline"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
            run.font.bold = True
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DEEP_PURPLE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.5),
                 "Phased rollout over 12 months for maximum impact", 16, False, DEEP_PURPLE)

    milestones = [
        ("Q1 2025", "Program Launch", "Needs assessment &\nprogram design"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Pilot Phase", "Department rollout\n& feedback collection"),
        ("Q3 2025", "Full Rollout", "Organization-wide\nimplementation"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Review & Optimize", "Metrics analysis\n& program refinement")
    ]

    for i, (quarter, phase, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 2.3)
        y = Inches(2.5)

        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x, y, Inches(1.4), Inches(1.4))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CORAL if i % 2 == 0 else LAVENDER)
        circle.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DEEP_PURPLE)
        circle.line.width = Pt(2)

        tf = circle.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = quarter
        run.font.size = Pt(13)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
        run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

        add_text_box(slide, x - Inches(0.2), y + Inches(1.6), Inches(1.8), Inches(0.4), phase, 13, True, DEEP_PURPLE, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x - Inches(0.2), y + Inches(2.1), Inches(1.8), Inches(1.5), desc, 11, False, hex_to_rgb(DEEP_PURPLE), PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.6), Inches(3.1), Inches(7.8), Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CORAL)
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 3, 6)


def slide_04_budget(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Budget Allocation"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
            run.font.bold = True
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DEEP_PURPLE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.5),
                 "Total annual wellness budget: $500,000", 16, False, DEEP_PURPLE)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Wellness Programs", "Mental Health", "Fitness Facilities", "Nutrition", "Other"]
    chart_data.add_series("Budget Allocation", (30, 25, 20, 15, 10))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(0.8), Inches(2.2), Inches(4.5), Inches(4.0), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_legend = True

    budget_items = [
        ("Wellness Programs", "30%", "$150,000"),
        ("Mental Health Services", "25%", "$125,000"),
        ("Fitness Facilities", "20%", "$100,000"),
        ("Nutrition & Wellness", "15%", "$75,000"),
        ("Other Initiatives", "10%", "$50,000")
    ]

    for i, (name, pct, amt) in enumerate(budget_items):
        y = Inches(2.3 + i * 0.85)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.6), y, Inches(1.8), Inches(0.4), name, 12, True, DEEP_PURPLE)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.5), y, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), pct, 12, False, CORAL)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.2), y, Inches(1.0), Inches(0.4), amt, 12, False, DEEP_PURPLE)

    add_footer(slide, 4, 6)


def slide_05_kpis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[5])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "KPIs & Key Metrics"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.size = Pt(32)
            run.font.bold = True
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DEEP_PURPLE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.5),
                 "Measuring success across core wellness indicators", 16, False, DEEP_PURPLE)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Engagement", "Stress Mgmt", "Absenteeism", "Satisfaction"]
    chart_data.add_series("Current Score", (62, 48, 71, 59))
    chart_data.add_series("Target Score", (80, 75, 90, 85))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.3), Inches(6.0), Inches(4.0), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_legend = True
    if chart.has_legend:
        for run in chart.legend.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.size = Pt(10)

    metrics = [
        ("Employee Participation", "78%", "Target: 90%"),
        ("Program Satisfaction", "4.5/5", "Target: 4.7/5"),
        ("Health Cost Savings", "$120K", "Annual projection")
    ]

    for i, (metric, value, target) in enumerate(metrics):
        y = Inches(2.3 + i * 1.6)
        add_card(slide, Inches(6.8), y, Inches(2.7), Inches(1.4), metric, f"{value} — {target}", LAVENDER, CORAL)

    add_footer(slide, 5, 6)


def slide_06_cta(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, SOFT_PINK_BG)

    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.8), Inches(1.3), LAVENDER)
    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(9.2), Inches(1.0), Inches(1.0), CORAL)
    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(4.5), Inches(6.5), Inches(0.7), ACCENT_LAVENDER)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Let's Build a Healthier Workplace"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.size = Pt(40)
            run.font.bold = True
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DEEP_PURPLE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(7), Inches(0.6),
                 "Together we can create a thriving work environment", 24, False, DEEP_PURPLE, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    steps = [
        ("Step 1", "Schedule a wellness assessment"),
        ("Step 2", "Form cross-functional planning team"),
        ("Step 3", "Launch pilot program in Q1")
    ]

    for i, (step, desc) in enumerate(steps):
        y = Inches(4.0 + i * 0.7)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), y, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), step, 16, True, CORAL, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), y + Inches(0.3), Inches(5), Inches(0.4), desc, 14, False, DEEP_PURPLE, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(6.2), Inches(7), Inches(0.5),
                 "Contact: hr-wellness@company.com | Intranet: wellness.hub", 13, False, hex_to_rgb(CORAL), PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 6, 6)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_pillars(prs)
    slide_03_timeline(prs)
    slide_04_budget(prs)
    slide_05_kpis(prs)
    slide_06_cta(prs)

    prs.save("Employee_Wellness_Plan.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
